overview: SURAJGARH RESORT is a premium luxury wedding resort website featuring public venue pages with live booking calendars, a gallery, and contact information — all managed through a secure admin panel for real-time booking management, photo uploads, and content editing.
features: Public venue pages for 5 gardens/banquet halls with availability calendars
Real-time calendar sync between admin and public
Photo manager by category (banners, gardens, halls, rooms, gallery)
Text/content manager for all site text
Announcement system for wedding offers and updates
Royal gold, black, cream, dark green luxury theme
